name: AVE-1625
description: AVE-1625 is an oral selective and potent antagonist of cannabinoid 1 (CB1) receptors having the same mechanism of action as rimonabant. It is currently developed in obesity and its associated comorbidities. AVE-1625 is also being developed for the treatment of Alzheimer disease.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in alzheimer's disease, obesity, and schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorders.
mechanismOfAction: AVE-1625 is a selective and potent antagonist of cannabinoid 1 (CB1) receptors having the same mechanism of action as rimonabant.
